2606.24483.title: Adaptive Machine Learning Framework for UAV Trajectory Optimization in O-RAN
2606.24483.paper_summary: The deployment of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAV) as open radio units (O-RUs) in 6G cellular systems presents a promising opportunity to achieve scalable and adaptive network coverage. However, optimizing UAV trajectories in dynamic and unfamiliar environments remains a critical challenge, particularly due to the need for extensive retraining in each new scenario. In this paper, we introduce a novel UAV trajectory optimization framework that integrates enhanced continual transfer learning within the O-RAN architecture. The proposed system maintains a library of pre-trained models and employs a model selection mechanism to identify and transfer knowledge from the most relevant environments, minimizing adaptation time and improving efficiency. When no sufficiently similar model is available, a fallback model empowered by continuous refinements ensures baseline performance. The framework leverages real-world city maps and ray tracing techniques to enhance learning reliability and improve trajectory planning. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed model selection-based transfer learning approach reduces convergence time by 44% to 56% compared to retraining from scratch, and up to 40% compared to traditional transfer learning without model selection.
2606.24483.paper_summary_zh: 無人機（UAV）作為開放無線單元（O-RUs）在6G行動系統中的部署，提供了一個實現可擴展和自適應網絡覆蓋的有前景的機會。<lb/>然而，在動態和不熟悉的環境中優化UAV軌跡仍然是一個關鍵挑戰，特別是因為在每個新場景中需要進行廣泛的再訓練。<lb/>在本文中，我們介紹了一個新穎的UAV軌跡優化框架，該框架在O-RAN架構中整合了增強的持續轉移學習。<lb/>所提出的系統維護了一個預訓練模型庫，並採用模型選擇機制來識別和轉移來自最相關環境的知識，從而最小化適應時間並提高效率。<lb/>當沒有足夠相似的模型可用時，一個通過持續改進賦能的後備模型確保基線性能。<lb/>該框架利用現實世界的城市地圖和光線追蹤技術來增強學習的可靠性並改善軌跡規劃。<lb/>模擬結果表明，所提出的基於模型選擇的轉移學習方法相比於從頭再訓練，將收斂時間減少了44%至56%，相比於沒有模型選擇的傳統轉移學習，則減少了多達40%。
2606.24483.author: Chenrui Sun et.al.
2606.24483.authors: Chenrui Sun, Swarna Bindu Chetty, Gianluca Fontanesi, Mahnaz Arvaneh, Walid Saad, Hamed Ahmadi
